mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND SET INBOUND_YN = 'Y', INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND_ID = #{tblReturnInboundId}

UPDATE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND SET OUTBOUND_YN = 'Y', OUTBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, OUTBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, OUTBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND_ID = #{tblReturnInboundId}

UPDATE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND SET INBOUND_YN = 'Y', INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND_ID IN
#{id}

UPDATE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND SET OUTBOUND_YN = 'Y', OUTBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, OUTBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, OUTBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND_ID IN
#{id}

UPDATE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND SET OUTBOUND_TARGET_YN = #{outboundTargetYn}, UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RETURN_INBOUND_ID IN
#{id}
